summary.AlgorithmTooltip: Rank assignment algorithm for hybrid parallelism
DimensionTooltipContent: (1) Switch between parallel dimensions to view corresponding rank layouts. Collapsed dimensions group multiple ranks into one element -- hover to see details.
(2) Select a metric under "Performance Metrics" to display a corresponding heatmap in the parallel layout diagram.
(3) Click a legend item to highlight related parallel groups in the layout.
(4) Click an element in the layout to visualize communication domains across different parallel strategies.
(5) Click the highlighted boxes or lines to view detailed bar charts, pipeline parallelism timelines, and other insights in the "Computation / Communication Overview" section.
summary.DPDimensionTooltip: Collapse TP, PP, and CP details
summary.TPDimensionTooltip: Expand all dimensions for complete cluster analysis
summary.MindIE Size Validate Message: World Size ( PP × TP × DP ) must be greater than the device count
summary.Megatron Size Validate Message: World Size ( PP × TP × CP × DP ) must be greater than the device count
Computation/CommunicationDescribe: Computing = Sum of kernel time on NPU
Total Time = Computing(Not Overlapped) + Computing_Communication Overlapped + Communication(Not Overlapped) + Free
Total Computing Ratio = Computing / Total Time
Communication Ratio = Communication(Not Overlapped) / Total Time
Computation/CommunicationDescribeWithPre: Total Computing = Sum of kernel time on NPU
Total Time = Preparing + Computing(Not Overlapped) + Computing_Communication Overlapped + Communication(Not Overlapped) + Free
Total Computing Ratio = Computing / Total Time
Communication Ratio = Communication(Not Overlapped) / Total Time
summary.Computation/CommunicationLastDescribe: Click Bar Chart Display The Single Rank Computation / Communication Detail
summary.Name: Name
summary.Communication(Not Overlapped and Exclude: Communication(Not Overlapped and Exclude Receive Ops)
summary.Max Computing + Communication(Not Overla: Max Total Time(Computing + Communication(Not Overlapped) + Free)
summary.Min Computing + Communication(Not Overla: Min Total Time(Computing + Communication(Not Overlapped) + Free)
summary.Computing + Communication(Not Overlapped: Total Time(Computing + Communication(Not Overlapped) + Free) Range
summary.SummaryAdvice: {{type}} has some issues in the cluster, because the max difference of {{type}} time has reached {{time}}μs.
StageTimeAndBubbleTimeDescribe: Stage Time: Time excluding the portion consumed by the receive operator under pipeline parallelism
Bubble Time: Total time consumed by the receive operator
summary.ProhibitConfiguration: The data collected by the system cannot be manually configured
summary.GenerateConfirm: Are you sure you want to change this configuration, as it is inconsistent with the system's collected configuration?
summary.NoDataTip: Parallel strategy parameters are missing from the collected data. Please configure them
summary.slow rank advice: Check if these groups/ranks are slowing down the cluster—longer sync times indicate worse cluster asynchrony, which increases the likelihood of performance bottlenecks.
summary.No problem: There is no obvious fast or slow card problem in the current dimension.

SlowRank ToolTip.dpSynchronizeTime: Maximum 'DP-Average Communication Time' of the DP communication domain in which it is located minus the 'DP-Average Communication Time' of the current element.
SlowRank ToolTip.cpSynchronizeTime: Maximum 'CP-Average Communication Time' of the CP communication domain in which it is located minus the 'CP-Average Communication Time' of the current element.
SlowRank ToolTip.tpSynchronizeTime: Maximum 'TP-communication time' of the TP-communication domain in which it is located minus the 'TP-communication time' of the current element.
